title: Zameer The Fire Within
desc: A spoiled brat gets married to her professor despite several challenges. Soon after, he learns that his wife was responsible for the separation of his ex-girlfriend and he leaves her, never to return.

title: Lootera
desc: A story of a con artist, Varun who falls in love with Pakhi, daughter of a wealthy landowner. Varun and his partner deceive Pakhi's father by pretending to be archaeologists in search of a hidden treasure. But their plan goes awry when Varun starts to develop genuine feelings for Pakhi. Their love story is a poignant and tragic tale of sacrifice and redemption.

title: Nh10
desc: Gurgaon professionals Meera and Arjun are shaken after Meera survives a brutal attack. Seeking escape, they take a desert holiday, but at a highway dhaba they witness hoodlums abducting a young girl.

title: Fight Club
desc: The movie follows an insomniac office worker who befriends a charismatic soap salesman, and together they start an underground fight club as a way to cope with their mundane lives. As the club gains popularity, they become involved in a larger plan to undermine the consumerist society they live in.

title: Gumnaam The Mystery
desc: An aspiring actress, Ria who models and acts in music videos is offered a lead role in a film by casting director Rishi Gandhi. However, when she arrives at the director's mansion, she begins to realise that things are not as they seem.
